---
title: "Open Research practices for linguistics"
author: Stefano Coretta
institute: University of Edinburgh
date: 2026/03/18
format: revealjs
bibliography: references.bib
---

## The research crisis

::::: columns
::: {.column width="60%"}
-   @pashler2012: "a crisis of confidence?".

-   @yarkoni2022: lack of meaningful connection between verbal generalisations and evidence.

-   @scheel2020: we are not even wrong.
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
![](../img/nik-0urrnqA66Lo-unsplash-2.jpg){width="300"}

[Photo by <a href="https://unsplash.com/@helloimnik?utm_source=unsplash&utm_medium=referral&utm_content=creditCopyText">Nik</a> on <a href="https://unsplash.com/photos/red-text-on-black-background-0urrnqA66Lo?utm_source=unsplash&utm_medium=referral&utm_content=creditCopyText">Unsplash</a>]{style="font-size: 8px;"}
:::
:::::

## Research reliability

![From [The Turing Way](https://book.the-turing-way.org/reproducible-research/overview/overview-definitions/).](/img/reproducible-matrix-d15700202901e2e2e85fd2dcc71a158b.jpg){fig-align="center"}

## Research reliability

![From The Turing Way.](/img/reproducible-matrix-d15700202901e2e2e85fd2dcc71a158b-2.jpg){fig-align="center"}

## Research reliability

::: callout-note
## Research soundness

-   Research reliability implies that research is sound! [@yarkoni2022; @devezer2021].
-   Transparency is key.
:::

## Open Research

::: callout-note
## What is it?

Open Research is a movement that stresses the importance of a more honest and transparent research by promoting a series of research principles and by warning about common, although not necessarily intentional, questionable practices and misconceptions [@munafo2017; @cruwell2019; @casillas2025].
:::

. . .

::: callout-important
## How to make your research open?

-   Share **Research Compendia**.

-   Write **Registered Reports**.

-   Include **Positionality Statements**.
:::

## Share Research Compendia

::: callout-note
## Research Compendium

A **research compendium**
:::

## References
